title: Giant Bamboo
description: Adds a giant bamboo to the Bamboo Jungle biome
body:
Giant Bamboo

This simple mod adds a giant Bamboo to the Bamboo Jungle Biome.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41f6e87f39b15f4869ce446e54d73dbc20e30a37.jpeg)

- The terrain around the bamboo is designed to blend naturally with the biome.
- A perfect spot to build a base nearby

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15d2660195a1d7ce886308d9689f1b8c6593f375.jpeg)

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
